channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gaspari Nutrition SizeOn new formula: Amino9, HMB, and 6g creatine
item.description: Legendary supplement updated with new ingredients after two decades.

item.title: Roundhouse Provisions Cognitive Warrior: Chuck Norris brain health legacy
item.description: Late action star's brand focused on Cognizin-powered cognitive support.

item.title: NNB Nutrition launches Clean & Clear Series plant protein for beverages
item.description: Clear protein sodas drive demand for plant-based alternatives to whey.

item.title: Strengthera: PLT Health's botanical for muscle maintenance on GLP-1s
item.description: Clinically studied ingredient supports vitality during weight loss.

item.title: C4 Energy Mango Fuego heats up Hot Ones Versus with Miami Heat
item.description: Bam Adebayo and Jaime Jaquez Jr. feature in spicy energy drink campaign.

item.title: RHR: The GLP-1 blind spot: what Ozempic won't do for metabolic health
item.description: Podcast explores science behind GLP-1 medications beyond appetite and weight loss.

item.title: Vitaquest recalls 350,000 iron supplements over faulty packaging
item.description: Contract manufacturer voluntarily recalls products from various brands.

item.title: Everwell Health highlights growing consumer demand for mobility support
item.description: 'Don't Stop Moving' campaign emphasizes key mobility pillars.

item.title: RHR: Shaking up the salt myth
item.description: Decades of warnings on sodium reduction for blood pressure are challenged.

item.title: Dietary supplement age restriction bill introduced in Rhode Island
item.description: Senate Bill 2774 would limit sales of weight-loss and muscle-building supplements.

item.title: Nude Foods Market scales zero-waste grocery model
item.description: Colorado company eliminates single-use plastic from grocery shopping.

item.title: Military Energy Gum first to earn NSF Certified for Sport
item.description: Ford Gum's product achieves certification for athletic safety standards.

item.title: RHR: Mouth taping beyond the hype: what science really says
item.description: Chris Kresser explores viral trend of sleeping with mouth taped.

item.title: RHR: Erythritol: the 'safe' sweetener that's anything but
item.description: Popular sugar-free sweetener may have hidden health risks.

item.title: RHR: Preserving cognitive function as you age, with Tommy Wood
item.description: Neuroscientist and physician discuss strategies for brain health.

item.title: Liver detoxification and bile flow: science behind liver support
item.description: The liver is one of the most metabolically active organs in the body.

item.title: Retatrutide dosing guide: schedule, safety, and weight loss results
item.description: Promising new drug in clinical development for metabolic health.

item.title: Estrogen blocker for men: smarter approach to natural balance
item.description: Equilone supports estrogen balance without isolation of hormones.

item.title: Teriparatide for osteoporosis: how it rebuilds bone and reduces fractures
item.description: Bone-thinning condition affects many, but treatment can restore density.

item.title: What 'clinically dosed' really means and why most supplements get it wrong
item.description: Overused claim in sports supplement industry often misunderstood.
